summary: Iteration 106: All bug fixes verified - Pet Soul Score weighted scoring, Select dropdown z-index, Farewell emotional indicator, Wishlist API

Select dropdown z-index fixed to z-[100] in select.jsx line 55 - ensures dropdown appears above dialogs
Farewell page emotional indicator implemented at lines 642-652 - shows purple box with heart emoji when user's pet is selected
Wishlist API fully functional: POST /api/member/wishlist/add, GET /api/member/wishlist, DELETE /api/member/wishlist/{id}, GET /api/admin/wishlists/summary
